message:
feat(worker): improve cache cleanup and runtime handling

Enhances the worker cache management with safer cleanup operations and
improved runtime handling for better reliability under concurrent builds.

Cache cleanup improvements (cache.rs):
- Optimistic empty directory removal without pre-check
- Proper handling of DirectoryNotEmpty error (race conditions)
- Cleaner debug logging for removal attempts
- Increment cleaned count on successful removal
- Skip silently when directory becomes non-empty during cleanup

This change addresses a subtle race condition where:
1. Worker checks if project directory is empty
2. New build starts, creating files in the directory
3. Worker tries to remove "empty" directory
4. Removal fails unexpectedly

The new approach:
1. Attempt remove_dir() directly (atomic check-and-remove)
2. If DirectoryNotEmpty, silently skip (expected race)
3. If other error, log warning and increment errors

Main runtime changes (main.rs):
- Additional telemetry collection points
- Improved startup logging
- Enhanced signal handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
